job_category.source: current ExperienceTimelineItem.jobField or profile jobField list

eligibilityRules.templatesRequiringCurrentRole: eligible when current timeline item has non-empty jobTitle
eligibilityRules.templatesRequiringJobCategory: eligible when jobField exists and is in fixed taxonomy
eligibilityRules.templatesRequiringPreviousRole: eligible when previous timeline item has non-empty jobTitle
